article.title: Japan’s Prediction Market Startups Use Loyalty Points to Bypass Gambling Ban
article.summary: Homegrown platforms, banned from real-money gambling, are tapping the country’s loyalty-point culture to build an alternative to Polymarket.
article.title_zh: 日本預測市場新創公司利用忠誠積分規避賭博禁令
article.summary_zh: 本土平台因被禁止進行真金賭博，正在利用日本的忠誠積分文化來打造 Polymarket 的替代方案。

article.title: “Bring it to our shop”: Workday’s pitch for keeping AI agents close to your most valuable data
article.summary: Workday, the payroll and HR data platform, has been pursuing AI and agents for a while, but while other businesses may allow a little room for error, getting a payroll run in Workday 99% right is not exactly good enough. Gabe Monroy , Workday’s chief technology officer, tells The New Stack that enterprise AI has to clear this bar before anyone will let it near their HR and finance data. “There aren’t many systems that are more critical — or less forgiving — than ones that are dealing with people and money,” he says. There’s no tolerance for “well, it works most of the time,” Monroy says in an interview. At its DevCon developer conference in early June, Workday laid out its plans to clear this correctness bar. The company introduced Agen
article.title_zh: 「帶到我們店裡」：Workday 推介將 AI 代理保持在最寶貴數據附近的方案
article.summary_zh: Workday 這個薪資和人力資源數據平台一直在開發 AI 和代理，但與其他企業不同，薪資運行 99% 的準確度對於 Workday 來說還不夠好。

article.title: Samsung, SK Hynix to Build Two Chip Fabs in $518 Billion Project
article.title_zh: 三星、SK 海力士將在 518 億美元項目中建造兩座晶片廠

article.title: FT Reports That Apple Is Lobbying to Buy Memory Chips From Blacklisted Chinese Company CXMT
article.title_zh: 英國金融時報報導 Apple 遊說購買被列入黑名單的中國公司 CXMT 的記憶體晶片

article.title: What new Google Messages features are rolling out [June 2026]
article.summary: Like other Google apps, Messages for Android A/B tests many features. It can take the RCS/SMS client a rather long time to actually launch new functionality in stable. From various reports, Google announcements , and devices we’ve checked, this is the current state of Messages.
article.title_zh: Google Messages 推出哪些新功能 [2026 年 6 月]
article.summary_zh: Google Messages 進行多項 A/B 測試，RCS/SMS 用戶端需要相當長的時間才能推出穩定版新功能。

article.title: Upgrade your social media with Vmake’s all-in-one studio – here’s what it can do
article.summary: The social media age begs businesses and everyone else to bridge the gap between quality and quantity and, with Vmake’s AI studio of tools, you get an all-in-one, one-stop shop for everything you need to more easily create content.
article.title_zh: 使用 Vmake 的一站式工作室升級您的社群媒體—以下是它能做的事
article.summary_zh: Vmake AI 工具工作室提供一站式服務，幫助企業和個人輕鬆平衡品質與數量，創作更多內容。

article.title: White House Grants Access to Anthropic’s Mythos Model to 100+ U.S. Institutions; Fable Still Shut Down
article.title_zh: 白宮授予 Anthropic 的 Mythos 模型訪問權限給 100+ 美國機構；Fable 仍被關閉

article.title: Okta is the first to bring AI agent governance inside FedRAMP boundaries
article.summary: Okta has made its AI agent governance platform generally available for FedRA MP- and HIPAA-regulated environments, becoming what it claims is the first independent identity platform to extend AI agent lifecycle management inside the compliance boundaries federal agencies and healthcare organizations already trust. The product, Okta for AI Agents – Core , elevates AI agents to first-class identities managed alongside human and machine workforces. This is a shift from the practice of treating agents as static service accounts or hardcoded API keys. The launch comes as federal agencies face mounting pressure from the recent executive order on AI innovation and security, which directs agencies to deploy AI agents and mandates that they secure them. “The message
article.title_zh: Okta 首次在 FedRAMP 邊界內推出 AI 代理治理
article.summary_zh: Okta 已使其 AI 代理治理平台在 FedRAMP 和 HIPAA 受規管環境中正式上市，成為首個將 AI 代理生命週期管理擴展到聯邦機構和醫療保健合規邊界內的獨立身份平台。

article.title: AI Startup Firmus to Build Indonesia Data Center With Nvidia
article.summary: Firmus Technologies Pty Ltd. will build its first data center project in Indonesia as part of a partnership with US chip giant Nvidia Corp., which the Australian artificial intelligence infrastructure firm said is expected to win it as much as $30 billion in committed offtake agreements in its first six years.
article.title_zh: AI 新創企業 Firmus 將與 Nvidia 在印尼建設資料中心
article.summary_zh: 澳洲人工智慧基礎設施公司 Firmus Technologies Pty Ltd. 將與美國晶片巨擘 Nvidia Corp. 合作，在印尼建設首個資料中心項目，預期將獲得最多 300 億美元的承諾購電協議。

article.title: Google Caps Meta’s Use of Gemini AI, Financial Times Reports
article.summary: Google has placed limits on Meta Platforms Inc.’s use of its Gemini artificial intelligence models because it could not provide as much computing capacity as the social media company wanted, according to the Financial Times.
article.title_zh: 據金融時報報導，Google 限制 Meta 使用 Gemini AI
article.summary_zh: 根據金融時報報導，Google 限制 Meta Platforms Inc. 使用其 Gemini 人工智慧模型，因為 Google 無法提供該社群媒體公司所需的運算容量。
